text.title: Agent Architectures (Memory + Tools + Planning + Reflection) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-architectures. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Define tool registry: name, schema, executor.
step.description: Input: tool inventory. Action: Author registry.. Output: registry.py.

step.name: Define FSM states + transition logger.
step.description: Input: FSM design. Action: Author state machine.. Output: fsm.py.

step.name: Wire memory store with summarization at 30% threshold.
step.description: Input: vector store. Action: Author memory class.. Output: memory.py.

step.name: Implement planning + reflection loops.
step.description: Input: FSM + memory. Action: Author planner + reflector.. Output: loops live.

step.name: Add idle-eviction policy + OTel spans.
step.description: Input: loops + observability. Action: Author eviction + spans.. Output: agent prod-ready.

step.name: Run eval suite; iterate on r3/r4 thresholds.
step.description: Input: agent + eval. Action: Sweep + tune.. Output: tuned agent.
